stage_identity.evidence: Teen stage Byte with gangly proportions maintained. Multi-image edit used stage anchor (.codepet/stage_images/teen.png) as reference to preserve canonical teen silhouette.

pixel_style.evidence: Pixel art style preserved with clean 2D forms and dithered shading. Output maintains readable silhouette consistent with prior edits.

requested_changes_visible.evidence: Edit reflects transition from trophy-gazing to coding-ready posture. Byte positioned at desk with hand on keyboard, maintaining ecstatic mood from 9 commits and 6-day streak.

artifact_free.evidence: No garbled text, floating glyphs, malformed anatomy, or smeared objects detected in output. File size change (313404 -> 314918 bytes) indicates meaningful pixel modification.

prop_layout_integrity.evidence: Single food bowl positioned on floor to right of desk (no duplicates). Trophy shelf above desk with single 10-day trophy on left and single green plant on right, properly spaced with no overlap.

anchors_present.evidence: All three required anchors visible: wooden desk center stage, oversized laptop open and glowing, Chicago skyline visible through window in background.

temporal_mood_match.evidence: Afternoon lighting with warm golden-yellow tones matches temporal state (2:52 PM Chicago time). Ecstatic mood reflected in Byte's alert posture and energy. is_sleeping=false correctly shows awake, active Byte.

reground_cleanup.evidence: Not applicable for normal mode. Mode is 'normal' with edit_count_since_reset=5/6, no re-ground triggered.
